# pyathena.photchem atomic data : HeI
# CHIANTI source : ion he_1
# Levels kept    : lowest 5 of CHIANTI (padded to 5 if smaller)
# T grid tier    : cold
# T grid         : 80 log-spaced points, 10 K -> 1e+05 K
# Generated by   : pyathena/photchem/data/build_chianti_tables.py
#
# Indices below are 0-based pyathena indices (level 0 = ground).
# CHIANTI level numbers are 1-based and shown for cross-reference.
#
LEVELS N=5
# idx  chianti_lvl  conf            term       j     g    E_erg            E_K
0     1            1s2             1S0        0.0   1     0.000000e+00   0.000000e+00
1     2            1s.2s           3S1        1.0   3     3.174742e-11   2.299456e+05
2     3            1s.2s           1S0        0.0   1     3.302272e-11   2.391826e+05
3     4            1s.2p           3P2        2.0   5     3.358065e-11   2.432237e+05

# upper_idx  lower_idx   upsilon(T_GRID[0]..T_GRID[N-1])
